heading: Usage
body:
Use the MongoDB Vector Store node in the following
workflow patterns:

**Ai-agent:**

AI Agent Tool

Connect directly to an AI agent as a tool to perform
[agentic RAG](agentic-rag).

```text
AI Agent (tools connector) → MongoDB Vector Store
```

For a tutorial, see [Build an AI Agent with MongoDB and n8n](n8n-get-started).

To learn more about AI agents in n8n, see
[AI agent node](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/cluster-nodes/root-nodes/n8n-nodes-langchain.agent/).

**Regular:**

Regular Node

Use the MongoDB Atlas Vector Store as a regular node to insert or retrieve
documents in your custom workflows:

```text
Trigger → MongoDB Vector Store (Insert/Get) → Next Node
```

To learn more, see [Nodes](https://docs.n8n.io/workflows/components/nodes/).

**Retriever:**

As Retriever

Use the node as a retriever in a question-answering chain:

```text
Question and Answer Chain → Vector Store Retriever → MongoDB Vector Store
```

To learn more about Q\&A in n8n, see [Question and Answer Chain node](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/cluster-nodes/root-nodes/n8n-nodes-langchain.chainretrievalqa/).

**Qa-tool:**

As Question-Answering Tool

Use the node as a question-answering tool for an AI agent:

```text
AI Agent → Vector Store Question Answer Tool → MongoDB Vector Store
```

To learn more about the question-answering tool in n8n, see
[Vector Store Question Answer Tool node](https://docs.n8n.io/integrations/builtin/cluster-nodes/sub-nodes/n8n-nodes-langchain.toolvectorstore/).

codeBlocks.content: AI Agent (tools connector) → MongoDB Vector Store
Trigger → MongoDB Vector Store (Insert/Get) → Next Node
Question and Answer Chain → Vector Store Retriever → MongoDB Vector Store
AI Agent → Vector Store Question Answer Tool → MongoDB Vector Store
